close_reason: Already implemented as part of turnkey-4oa. tk check exits with code 0 if files are up-to-date, code 1 if stale.
description:
Implement `tk check` subcommand for CI validation.

Behavior:
- Check all staleness rules (deps + BUCK files)
- Do NOT regenerate anything
- Exit 0 if everything in sync
- Exit 1 if anything stale, with clear error message

CI usage:
```yaml
- name: Check BUCK files in sync
  run: tk check
```

Output on failure:
```
tk check
ERROR: Files out of sync

  go-deps.toml is stale (go.mod is newer)
  Run 'tk sync' to regenerate

Exit 1
```
title: tk check: CI validation subcommand
